response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with strong software engineering fundamentals and recent engagement with AI infrastructure, the role explicitly requires recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI. The resume shows no AI/ML background, no AI-focused projects, and only 6 months of recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure in an engineering capacity, not strategic leadership. This mismatch in core domain expertise is critical for a Director-level Principal Engineer focused specifically on AI strategy.
strengths: Exceeds minimum 15-year requirement with ~18-20 years of software engineering experience across multiple domains
Demonstrated entrepreneurial mindset through GISCollective founder role and thought leadership via workshops and conference talks
Current role directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and modern tooling (MCP), showing recent pivot into AI space
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, research, or products—critical gap for AI Strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise
Missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI-related field; only BS in Computer Science
Career shows execution-focused full-stack/backend development, not strategic advisory or innovation leadership experience

key_factors.factor: No demonstrated AI expertise or products
Recent entry into AI (6 months) vs. strategic leadership requirement
Exceeds 15-year minimum with varied engineering breadth
